cases.description: Top-level JS regression bucket with 20 legacy bug patterns.
Top-level JS clean fixtures (should stay quiet).
module-specific buggy security fixture under test-suite/js/buggy.
Regression: ignore bogus ast-grep earlier in PATH and still run verified JS AST analysis.

bin_shims.ast-grep:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "${1:-}" == "--version" ]]; then
  echo "ast-grep 0.0.0"
  exit 0
fi
exit 64

cases.description: Regression: JS module must fail fast (exit 2) when JSX/TS/TSX is present but ast-grep is unavailable.

require_substrings: Environment error: ast-grep is required for TS/TSX/JSX scans

cases.description: Regression: detect invalid typeof string literals (non-parenthesized typeof form) via AST-confirmed matches.
module-specific clean fixture (allows single warning until tuned).

Express/Node clean API sample (should stay quiet).
Regression: explicit file targets must bypass whole-repo size guards and scan only the requested files.

require_substrings: Preparing shadow workspace for 2 specified file(s)

cases.description: C# async task-handle helper should stay quiet when handles are awaited via Task.WhenAll.

C# ast-grep rule pack should emit structured per-rule findings when ast-grep returns JSON matches.

bin_shims.ast-grep:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "${1:-}" == "--version" ]]; then
  echo "ast-grep 0.40.1"
  exit 0
fi
if [[ "${1:-}" == "run" && "${2:-}" == "--help" ]]; then
  exit 0
fi
if [[ "${1:-}" == "scan" ]]; then
  file="$PWD/test-suite/csharp/buggy/AstRulePackBuggy.cs"
  cat <<JSON
[
  {"ruleId":"cs-async-discarded-task-run","file":"$file","range":{"start":{"row":5,"column":8}}},
  {"ruleId":"cs-await-in-lock","file":"$file","range":{"start":{"row":8,"column":12}}}
]
JSON
  exit 0
fi
exit 64

require_substrings: Await used while holding a lock

TOON format falls back to JSON when tru binary is not available.

require_substrings_stderr: Warning: tru (TOON encoder) disabled by UBS_TEST_FORCE_NO_TOON=1
